composition.tagline: Edit, translate and refine — your content, your way.
composition.cta: Polish every word, then translate it in a click.
composition.title: Edit, translate & refine

beats.caption: Make it yours
beats.narration: eye-vanjel writes a strong first draft — but the best content always carries your touch. Let's refine a post, then share it in another language.

beats.label: Results · Your posts
beats.caption: Your generated posts
beats.narration: Here are your finished social posts. Every one is ready to use as-is — but say you'd like to tweak this Facebook post, and also share it in Spanish.

beats.label: Translate · Add a language first
beats.caption: Choose your language first
beats.narration: If you want a translation, choose your language before you edit. Open the picker, search, and add Spanish. You can add up to two languages alongside English.

beats.label: Edit · Inline
beats.caption: Edit it inline
beats.narration: Now refine your English post — change a word, add a verse reference, soften a line. Here we've added a warm invitation. Your edited English is the source of truth, so when you're happy, just save.

beats.label: Translate · From English
beats.caption: Translate in a click
beats.narration: Then click Re-translate from English, and eye-vanjel carries your polished English across to Spanish — keeping every edit intact.

beats.label: Translate · In Spanish
beats.caption: Ready in every language
beats.narration: And there it is — the same message, now in Spanish, ready to copy and share. Choose your languages, edit once in English, and translate everywhere — nothing gets lost along the way.

beats.caption: Your words, every language
beats.narration: That's editing and translation in eye-vanjel — your voice, refined and ready for everyone you serve.
